summary: Vertical selfie-style video of the DHS Secretary, a bearded man in a white dress shirt, speaking directly to camera in a wood-trimmed office with blue-grey walls, a mounted steer head and cowboy boots on wall shelves. Burned-in caption subtitles run along the bottom of the frame. The audio is him discussing the ongoing government shutdown, then past 70 days, and remarks attributed to Senator Schumer about Border Patrol and ICE. No music bed.

script.scene: Bearded man in white shirt speaks to camera; mounted steer head and cowboy boots on shelves behind; burned-in caption subtitles at bottom.
